title: SuggestionStamped payload
description: Emitted when a suggestion's resolved_commit_sha is set via suggestion_stamp_sha. Distinct from SuggestionResolved(kind="adopted", commit_sha=...) because suggestion_stamp_sha is a separate action used when adoption work lands AFTER the suggestion was resolved (resolve at decision time queuing a chain+task; stamp later when the implementing commit lands). Distinct from any future SuggestionEdited so readers can filter for SHA stamps without parsing field-name arrays.

commit_sha.description: The commit that lands the adopted suggestion's work, or the literal sentinel 'unversioned' for artifacts outside any git repo (user-level scripts, vault docs).
